name: sap-abap-units
description: ABAP Unit Testing for SAP ABAP development. Covers test class anatomy (FOR TESTING, RISK LEVEL, DURATION, setup/teardown), CL_ABAP_UNIT_ASSERT assertion methods, test doubles for CDS views and OO interfaces, mocking with CL_ABAP_TESTDOUBLE, test seams for function module injection, RAP EML testing with CDS test environments, ATC (ABAP Test Cockpit) configuration and code coverage, and logistics-specific patterns for testing EWM/TM BAdI implementations and function module calls. Key patterns: - CLASS-SETUP / setup / teardown lifecycle - CL_ABAP_UNIT_ASSERT for all assertion types - CL_ABAP_TESTDOUBLE for interface mocking - CL_CDS_TEST_ENVIRONMENT for CDS view doubles - Test seam + injection for function module mocking - Factory pattern for dependency injection - EML READ/MODIFY/COMMIT in RAP unit tests - ATC variant configuration and coverage targets
